--- SOURCE 2: Optoelectronic Devices and Integration ---
URL: https://www.optica.org/events/meeting_archives/2019/optoelectronic_devices_and_integration/

SUMMARY:
Optoelectronic Devices and Integration | Optica *   About Optica Optica The Optoelectronic Devices and Integration (OEDI) topical meeting addresses the latest developments in a broad range of optoelectronic technologies and their integration for a variety of commercial applications. It covers all aspects ofoptoelectronic devices and integration from concept, design, modeling, fabrication and characterization to applications of micro/nano-photonic devices and integration in optical communications, optical signal processing, and optical networks. *   Optical Fibers, Fiber-based Devices and Applications **Silicon Photonics for Quantum Information Technologies** **On-chip Chalcogenide Photonic Devices for Infrared Applications** *   About Optica More information about the use of cookies on our website can be found in our privacy policy.

Optoelectronic Devices and Integration
--------------------------------------

11 November 2019 – 14 November 2019  China Optics Valley Convention & Exhibition Center, Wuhan, Hubei China

![Image 1: Optoelectronic Devices and Integration](https://www.optica.org/events/meeting_archives/2019/optoelectronic_devices_and_integration/)
Researches on new materials, processes and designs are giving rise to optoelectronic devices with higher efficiencies, denser integration, and better reliabilities. The Optoelectronic Devices and Integration (OEDI) topical meeting addresses the latest developments in a broad range of optoelectronic technologies and their integration for a variety of commercial applications. It covers all aspects ofoptoelectronic devices and integration from concept, design, modeling, fabrication and characterization to applications of micro/nano-photonic devices and integration in optical communications, optical signal processing, and optical networks.

* * *

### Topics

1.   Physics and simulation of optoelectronic devices
2.   Silicon photonics and optical interconnects
3.   Semiconductor Lasers/LEDS and photodetectors
4.   Optoelectronic hybrid and monolithic integration
5.   Optoelectronic materials and devices
6.   Nanotechnologies in photonics
7.   Advanced quantum and optoelectronic applications
8.   Microwave photonics and optical signal processing
9.   Emerging optoelectronic applications

[Top](https://www.optica.org/events/meeting_archives/2019/optoelectronic_devices_and_integration/#top)

**Our website uses cookies**

 Overview 

In order to personalise content and ads, to remember your preferences, to enable social media features and to measure the traffic to our site, we use cookies. We also share information about your use of our website with our social media, analytics and advertising partners, who may combine that information with data they have already collected from your use of their services.

More information about the use of cookies on our website [can be found in our privacy policy](https://consent.studio/optica.org).

enriched_points.expanded_content: Recent research highlights significant advancements in optoelectronic device integration, showcasing enhanced efficiency and reliability due to innovative materials and designs.
Integrating optoelectronic devices is crucial for revolutionizing technologies, impacting industries like telecommunications and healthcare, and driving future innovations.

enriched_points.point_title: Call to action for future research
enriched_points.expanded_content: Continued research and collaboration are essential to explore new materials and techniques, paving the way for groundbreaking optoelectronic applications and advancements.
